describe.confidence_note: Well-defined from brainstorm session, clear scope and steps

specify.confidence_note: Revision 1: All 17 debate findings addressed. Removed auto-fix mode, added git checkpoint, agent interface contract, dynamic branch detection, dedup heuristic, prior-art caching, fix timeouts.

challenge.confidence_note: Debate complete. All findings addressed in revision 1. Revalidation passed.

edge_cases.confidence_note: PASS_WITH_NOTES. 3 high, 5 medium findings all addressed in spec revision 1.1. No regression needed.

premortem.confidence_note: 5 findings (2 NEW high, 2 NEW medium, 1 covered-insufficient). File-existence criteria and emoji/text severity mismatch addressed in spec. WebSearch fallback noted for implementation.

review.skip_reason: Stages 3-4.5 were thorough — 3-round debate, 3-round edge case analysis, and pre-mortem. 30+ findings addressed.

test.confidence_note: 44 test cases across 9 categories covering standalone, gate, sweep, triage, fix dispatch, edge cases, and pre-mortem findings. Manual verification — no automated test suite for this toolkit.

execute.notes: Both deliverables (prior-art.md, quality-sweep.md) implemented and in use.

regression_log.reason: 2 critical findings: F1 (description too broad), F3 (auto-fix no confirmation). 4 high findings: F2 (agent interface), F5 (dependency detection), F6 (no checkpoint), F8 (assumes main branch).
